news.title:
IOC, BPCL, and HPCL surged 8.2%-9% as crude prices tanked 13%.
Declining crude prices boost refiners' margins, easing inflation concerns.
news.summary:
IOC, BPCL, and HPCL surged 8.2%-9% as crude prices tanked 13%.
Declining crude prices boost refiners' margins, easing inflation concerns.

news.title:
BPCL surged nearly 8% as Brent crude fell over 13% post US-Iran ceasefire.
Oil marketing companies also saw significant gains in response to the crude drop.
news.summary:
BPCL surged nearly 8% as Brent crude fell over 13% post US-Iran ceasefire.
Oil marketing companies also saw significant gains in response to the crude drop.

news.title:
IOC, BPCL, and HPCL incurred a ₹6/litre loss on diesel in Q4 FY23.
This contrasts with a ₹5.5/litre profit in the same period last year.
news.summary:
IOC, BPCL, and HPCL incurred a ₹6/litre loss on diesel in Q4 FY23.
This contrasts with a ₹5.5/litre profit in the same period last year.

news.title:
IOC and BPCL defer refinery maintenance to ensure fuel supply amid Hormuz disruption.
India ramps up LPG production by 40%, meeting 60% of daily demand with imports secured.
news.summary:
IOC and BPCL defer refinery maintenance to ensure fuel supply amid Hormuz disruption.
India ramps up LPG production by 40%, meeting 60% of daily demand with imports secured.

news.title:
OMCs to pay discounted rates to refiners for petrol, diesel, ATF, and kerosene.
Move aims to limit losses from self-imposed freeze on retail fuel prices.
news.summary:
OMCs to pay discounted rates to refiners for petrol, diesel, ATF, and kerosene.
Move aims to limit losses from self-imposed freeze on retail fuel prices.

news.title:
OMCs set new rates for petroleum goods, discounts up to ₹60/litre below import costs from March 16.
Independent refiners like MRPL, CPCL, and HMEL likely to face significant impact from revised pricing.
news.summary:
OMCs set new rates for petroleum goods, discounts up to ₹60/litre below import costs from March 16.
Independent refiners like MRPL, CPCL, and HMEL likely to face significant impact from revised pricing.

news.title:
Govt to release ₹17,500 crore compensation to OMCs on LPG under-recoveries in FY27.
Amount will be disbursed in 7 equal tranches by March 2027 to IOC, HPCL, and BPCL.
news.summary:
Govt to release ₹17,500 crore compensation to OMCs on LPG under-recoveries in FY27.
Amount will be disbursed in 7 equal tranches by March 2027 to IOC, HPCL, and BPCL.

news.title:
OMCs like IOC, HPCL, and BPCL raise concerns over flex fuels' viability due to pricing issues.
They highlight minimal price difference between flex fuel and E20, despite lower calorific value impacting mileage.
news.summary:
OMCs like IOC, HPCL, and BPCL raise concerns over flex fuels' viability due to pricing issues.
They highlight minimal price difference between flex fuel and E20, despite lower calorific value impacting mileage.

news.title:
Indian Oil, HPCL, and BPCL assured no disruption in LPG, petrol, and diesel supplies.
HPCL delivered record 14.1L LPG cylinders; BPCL emphasized steady fuel supply amid Gulf conflict concerns.
news.summary:
Indian Oil, HPCL, and BPCL assured no disruption in LPG, petrol, and diesel supplies.
HPCL delivered record 14.1L LPG cylinders; BPCL emphasized steady fuel supply amid Gulf conflict concerns.

news.title:
Experts recommend 'Buy' for Gujarat Gas citing strong fundamentals but short-term margin pressures; 'Hold' for BPCL due to crude oil price volatility.
ICICI Prudential, UltraTech Cement, Tata Capital, and Paradeep Phosphates are advised as 'Hold' with sector-specific cautions and stop-loss strategies.
news.summary:
Experts recommend 'Buy' for Gujarat Gas citing strong fundamentals but short-term margin pressures; 'Hold' for BPCL due to crude oil price volatility.
ICICI Prudential, UltraTech Cement, Tata Capital, and Paradeep Phosphates are advised as 'Hold' with sector-specific cautions and stop-loss strategies.

news.title:
Industrial diesel prices increased by Rs 28.2/L, now Rs 137.8/L.
IOC & BPCL among firms impacted amid Middle East crisis.
news.summary:
Industrial diesel prices increased by Rs 28.2/L, now Rs 137.8/L.
IOC & BPCL among firms impacted amid Middle East crisis.

news.title:
Nomura warns OMCs like IOCL, BPCL, and HPCL face margin pressure from ATF, LPG price hikes, and subsidy burdens.
Petronet LNG expands capacity to 22.5 mtpa; RIL's SEZ refinery exempted from windfall tax, aiding margins.
news.summary:
Nomura warns OMCs like IOCL, BPCL, and HPCL face margin pressure from ATF, LPG price hikes, and subsidy burdens.
Petronet LNG expands capacity to 22.5 mtpa; RIL's SEZ refinery exempted from windfall tax, aiding margins.

news.title:
Airlines and OMCs discuss ATF pricing revision amid West Asia crisis.
Goal is to cushion aviation from surging jet fuel costs.
news.summary:
Airlines and OMCs discuss ATF pricing revision amid West Asia crisis.
Goal is to cushion aviation from surging jet fuel costs.

news.title:
Middle East conflict pushes crude prices up 50% since Feb 28, straining global markets.
Indian Oil, HPCL, and BPCL may face impact on petrol pricing amid supply crunch.
news.summary:
Middle East conflict pushes crude prices up 50% since Feb 28, straining global markets.
Indian Oil, HPCL, and BPCL may face impact on petrol pricing amid supply crunch.

news.title:
BPCL, HPCL, and IOC reversed early gains after excise duty cuts on fuel impacted their outlook amid volatile crude prices.
BPCL fell to ₹282.1, HPCL to ₹342.4, and IOC to ₹137.59 after initial surges, with long-term challenges persisting.
news.summary:
BPCL, HPCL, and IOC reversed early gains after excise duty cuts on fuel impacted their outlook amid volatile crude prices.
BPCL fell to ₹282.1, HPCL to ₹342.4, and IOC to ₹137.59 after initial surges, with long-term challenges persisting.

news.title:
Nayara Energy hiked petrol by Rs 5.3 and diesel by Rs 3/litre amid volatile global oil prices.
The hikes may shift market share to IOCL, BPCL, HPCL, risking Rs 202-1,000 crore in losses for OMCs.
news.summary:
Nayara Energy hiked petrol by Rs 5.3 and diesel by Rs 3/litre amid volatile global oil prices.
The hikes may shift market share to IOCL, BPCL, HPCL, risking Rs 202-1,000 crore in losses for OMCs.

news.title:
Govt cuts excise duty on petrol, diesel by ₹10/litre; imposes levies on exports.
Move aims to ease financial strain on state-run oil firms; no pump price reduction for consumers.
news.summary:
Govt cuts excise duty on petrol, diesel by ₹10/litre; imposes levies on exports.
Move aims to ease financial strain on state-run oil firms; no pump price reduction for consumers.

news.title:
Govt boosts commercial LPG allocations by 20%, reaching 70% of pre-crisis levels.
Extra LPG supply prioritizes steel, auto, textiles, chemicals, and plastics sectors.
news.summary:
Govt boosts commercial LPG allocations by 20%, reaching 70% of pre-crisis levels.
Extra LPG supply prioritizes steel, auto, textiles, chemicals, and plastics sectors.

news.title:
Govt cuts excise duty on petrol to Rs 3/litre, scraps it on diesel.
HPCL, BPCL, IOC shares likely to stay in focus post policy change.
news.summary:
Govt cuts excise duty on petrol to Rs 3/litre, scraps it on diesel.
HPCL, BPCL, IOC shares likely to stay in focus post policy change.

news.title:
BPCL and IDBI Bank among 10 stocks hit hard, falling up to 54%.
Global markets, including Dalal Street, struggle as Iran-US war spikes oil prices.
news.summary:
BPCL and IDBI Bank among 10 stocks hit hard, falling up to 54%.
